summary: Jeff Atwood announces the completion of his MAME cocktail arcade cabinet project after two weeks of intensive work. He has created a dedicated project page with comprehensive documentation including photos, product links, and explanations for his design decisions. The post serves as a brief update pointing readers to the more detailed documentation, noting that the information applies broadly to MAME cabinet builds of all types.
key_points: Completed a MAME cocktail arcade cabinet after two weeks of continuous refinement
Created comprehensive documentation with photos, product links, and design rationales
The documentation is applicable to MAME cabinets of all types, not just cocktail style
References workplace interest in classic arcade gaming (Golden Tee)
money_quotes: After two weeks of non-stop tweaking, I think my MAME Cocktail arcade is finally complete.
Most of the comments there apply to MAME cabinets of all types, so if you have any interest in classic arcade gaming at all, it's worth reading.
key_insight: Thorough documentation of personal projects, including rationales behind decisions, creates valuable resources that can help others undertaking similar endeavors.
